gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration.
gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21; using it with JDK 21 results in compilation errors or runtime failures due to deprecated/removed APIs and bytecode incompatibilities.

gateway/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK.
gateway/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build targets Java 17 bytecode, which may not leverage Java 21 features or may fail if the project relies on Java 21-specific APIs or compiler flags.
